title: Survival Flint and Steel - Fire Starter Ferrocerium XL 10mm - Light More Than 15,000 Fires Ferro Rod - Firelighter Included - Firestarter Survival Kit for Camping, Bushcraft (Pine wood)
features: QUALITY & EFFICIENCY - Our firesteel is made from high quality materials. Its 10 mm wide and 7 cm long shaft is water resistant and will give you 15,000 uses (50% more than standard fire steel)

EXTREME CONDITIONS - Our fire striker and its wood fire lighter are completely waterproof and can still be used after getting wet. Ideal for all your outdoor activities, bushcraft, survival training, hiking, camping, trekking...

A COMPLETE SET - Our fire starter kit includes a lighting stick, a cloth pouch to store your kit, a multi-purpose scraper to use your firestarter, decap bottles, use it as a precision ruler and hex key

ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY - We have opted for a natural wood handle and a higher quality, more durable product. All our packaging is made of 100% recyclable materials and we do not add any over-wrapping or plastic
OURS FURTIF - Buying from us is the guarantee of a reactive support, available and listening to each customer. But also an access to exclusive content and guides on the use of our products

specifications_table.Included components: ‎Iron Rod, Multi-Tool Striker, Fat Wood Piece Lure
